attacking_style: Not a primary attacker; functions as high-altitude pacing resource rather than finale aggressor. Works in final 3km to deliver protected riders on mountain stages.
team_tactics: Deployed as super-domestique on high-mountain stages, controlling tempo in final kilometers to deliver team leader. Protected rider role reserved for lesser objectives where form permits.
terrain_preference: High-altitude mountain finishes where sustained tempo work (final 3km) is required. Struggles on punchy, explosive climbs like Civiglio where repeated accelerations occur.
vulnerability: End-of-season fatigue causes significant form drop; early victim on punchy climbs. Mechanical reliability issues with team equipment have caused race-ending crashes.
key_patterns: Dual role capacity: super-domestique in Grand Tours, protected rider in one-day races (2 instances)
Strong sustained climbing at altitude but dropped early on explosive punchy ascents (2 instances)
Form deteriorates significantly by late season, October races show clear weakness (1 strong instance)
Team mechanical issues affecting his race outcomes despite Ineos budget and resources (1 instance)
form_trajectory: negative: Strong Grand Tour climbing form in May (pacing at altitude) deteriorated sharply by October (early drop at Lombardia)
